description: What the Nori Lab webview is allowed to ask the native shell to do. Tauri denies everything not listed here, so this file is the whole surface.

permissions.comment: Open the hosted docs site in the user's real browser. Scoped to https:// on purpose: the webview loads the local backend (127.0.0.1:8000), so without a scope a compromised or buggy page could ask the OS to open file:// or a custom scheme. Only outbound web links are needed.
